release_notes: '-R1' is a refreshed revision of the Rex 3D 5MP (base model IPC-GS2DP-5K0W); the R1's own model code was not found and retailers conflate the two, so listed specs fall back to the base Rex 3D. Sensor conflicts across sources (1/2.8" vs 1/3"); the R1 refresh may add full-color night vision and a larger microSD — verify against the official datasheet.

frigate.notes: IMOU uses the Dahua protocol; the RTSP path follows the Dahua realmonitor convention. ONVIF/RTSP is documented for this plugged Wi-Fi line but not independently verified on this specific SKU.

home_assistant.notes: IMOU uses the Dahua protocol; the ONVIF integration works.

blue_iris.notes: Select the 'Dahua' profile — IMOU uses the Dahua protocol.
